tickets.summary: Agent task reports 'completed' before writing requested artifact to storage.
tickets.impact: Operator approved an agent run that produced no output. Required manual re-run.

tickets.summary: Batch of 12 agent tasks all show 'completed' status but only 4 have output artifacts.
tickets.impact: Team unable to determine which runs need to be re-triggered without manual log inspection.

tickets.summary: Pilot-bank-a compliance team flagged 8 agent reports that were accepted as complete but contained no data. Customer escalation active.
tickets.impact: Account-level escalation. Compliance review triggered. Potential SLA violation.

tickets.summary: Task history page shows 'completed' status for tasks that are still in the write phase.
tickets.impact: Status display is misleading but task execution is unaffected once the underlying runtime issue is resolved.
